debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
i : Fin d
μ : Fin d → Measure ℝ
inst✝ : ∀ (i : Fin d), IsProbabilityMeasure (μ i)
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : Integrable f (μ i)
⊢ ∫ (a : Fin d → ℝ), f (a i) ∂Measure.pi μ = ∫ (x : ℝ), f x ∂μ i

failed_attempts:
rw [integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i).aemeasurable, Measure.map_eval μ i]
  · rw [Measure.map_eval μ i]
    exact hf.aemeasurable

rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i] at hf ⊢
  exact integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i).aemeasurable hf.aestronglyMeasurable

rw [integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i), Measure.map_eval_pi]

rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i).aemeasurable _]

rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i] at hf ⊢
